title: helleborine setschuanica
intro: Helleborine setschuanica, also known as the Chinese Helleborine, is a type of orchid that belongs to the genus Coelogyne. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Helleborine setschuanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
